reason: Successfully tested agent messaging and received correct mathematical response from the "QA-20260629-221253-50cn" agent
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully, showing the "Your Agents" home page with multiple agents in the sidebar
Found and clicked on "QA-20260629-221253-50cn" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened successfully with title "QA-20260629-221253-50cn · Gamut"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status is "idle" as shown in the top right of the agent page
Typed and sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully typed into the input field and submitted via the Send message button
Waited for response from agent — Agent responded within 1 second (as shown by "Worked for 1s")

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response displayed "2+2 = 4" which correctly mentions "4", and the conversation is visible in the screenshot with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" (shown in top right message bubble) and agent response "2+2 = 4" (shown in the main conversation area). Session was created with title "Quick Math Question Session"
